seo_title: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Improves Audio AI for Natural and…
meta_description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live enhances audio AI with improved precision and lower latency, making voice interactions more fluid and natural.
body_html:
Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live improves audio AI with improved precision and lower latency, making voice interactions more fluid and natural.

Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is Google's highest-quality audio model, designed for natural and reliable real-time dialogue. Developers can access it through the Gemini Live API in Google AI Studio, while enterprises can use it for customer experience. Everyone can experience it via Search Live and Gemini Live, which now supports over 200 countries.

Scale AI’s Audio MultiChallenge 36.1%

Gemini 3.1 Flash Live leads with a score of 90.8% on ComplexFuncBench Audio, and 36.1% on Scale AI’s Audio MultiChallenge.

Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is available across Google products: for developers in preview via the Gemini Live API in Google AI Studio, for enterprises in Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience, and for everyone via Search Live and Gemini Live. It offers a more intuitive experience for developers, enterprises, and everyday users.

Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is designed to handle complex tasks at scale, with improved robust reasoning and task execution. It adapts to the speaker’s rhythm but does not assert dominance in user interruption scenarios.

source.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
source.summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
